# split-keys-actions

resource.customizations.actions.* and health.* split keys map to separate concern lists

!!! tip "Direction: `roundtrip`"

| | |
| --- | --- |
| Direction | `roundtrip` |
| Path | `testdata/cases/resource-customizations/split-keys-actions` |

## Input

### `argocd-cm.yaml`

```yaml
apiVersion: v1
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: argocd-cm
data:
  resource.customizations.health.cert-manager.io_Certificate: |
    hs = {}
    hs.status = "Healthy"
    return hs
  resource.customizations.actions.apps_Deployment: |
    discovery.lua: |
      actions = {}
      actions["restart"] = {}
      return actions
    definitions:
      - name: restart
        action.lua: |
          return obj
```

## Expected ArgoCDConfiguration

### `configuration.yaml`

```yaml
apiVersion: argoproj.io/v1alpha1
kind: ArgoCDConfiguration
metadata:
  name: argocd-config
  namespace: argocd
spec:
  controller:
    resource:
      actions:
      - definitions:
        - actionLua: |
            return obj
          name: restart
        discoveryLua: |
          actions = {}
          actions["restart"] = {}
          return actions
        group: apps
        kind: Deployment
      health:
      - group: cert-manager.io
        healthLua: |
          hs = {}
          hs.status = "Healthy"
          return hs
        kind: Certificate
```

## Expected ConfigMaps

### `argocd-cm.yaml`

```yaml
apiVersion: v1
data:
  resource.customizations.actions.apps_Deployment: |
    definitions:
    - action.lua: |
        return obj
      name: restart
    discovery.lua: |
      actions = {}
      actions["restart"] = {}
      return actions
  resource.customizations.health.cert-manager.io_Certificate: |
    hs = {}
    hs.status = "Healthy"
    return hs
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: argocd-cm
  namespace: argocd
```

### `argocd-cmd-params-cm.yaml`

```yaml
apiVersion: v1
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: argocd-cmd-params-cm
  namespace: argocd
```

### `argocd-rbac-cm.yaml`

```yaml
apiVersion: v1
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: argocd-rbac-cm
  namespace: argocd
```

  key: argocd-cmd-params-cm
  message: no source ConfigMap provided; labels/annotations cannot be preserved
